string.text: A bodysuit based on the suit used by the special forces of Western armies. Thanks to a special treatment of the fabric, the armor has a strengthened stability during the physical movement of its plates. It slightly surpasses the Sunrise bodysuit in terms of protection. The provided gas mask does not provide sufficient protection from the Zone’s harsh conditions.

An experimental sample of a military exoskeleton, originally of Western origin. It is part of the third generation and is used by mercenaries. The exoskeleton is designed for use in combat, and its level of protection from anomalies is low.

This bodysuit is manufactured by Monolith fanatics. Obtaining it is nearly impossible, although it features excellent protection against radiation and psy-emissions. The technology and materials used for making the armor are both unknown.
